parameters.query:
=WITH ord AS (
  SELECT store_id
  FROM public.order_summary
  WHERE order_id = '{{ String($('Normalize Feedback Input').first().json.order_id || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
  ORDER BY order_created_at DESC
  LIMIT 1
)
INSERT INTO public.order_feedback (order_id, chat_id, store_id, rating, issue_type, issue_text, status, created_at, updated_at)
VALUES (
  '{{ String($('Normalize Feedback Input').first().json.order_id || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ String($('Normalize Feedback Input').first().json.chat_id || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  (SELECT store_id FROM ord),
  'good',
  NULL,
  NULL,
  'positive',
  NOW(),
  NOW()
)
ON CONFLICT (order_id, chat_id) DO UPDATE
SET store_id = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.store_id, public.order_feedback.store_id),
    rating = 'good',
    issue_type = NULL,
    issue_text = NULL,
    status = 'positive',
    updated_at = NOW();
SELECT 'ok' AS result;

=WITH ord AS (
  SELECT store_id
  FROM public.order_summary
  WHERE order_id = '{{ String($('Normalize Feedback Input').first().json.order_id || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
  ORDER BY order_created_at DESC
  LIMIT 1
)
INSERT INTO public.order_feedback (order_id, chat_id, store_id, rating, issue_type, issue_text, status, created_at, updated_at)
VALUES (
  '{{ String($('Normalize Feedback Input').first().json.order_id || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ String($('Normalize Feedback Input').first().json.chat_id || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  (SELECT store_id FROM ord),
  'issue',
  NULL,
  NULL,
  'awaiting_issue_type',
  NOW(),
  NOW()
)
ON CONFLICT (order_id, chat_id) DO UPDATE
SET store_id = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.store_id, public.order_feedback.store_id),
    rating = 'issue',
    issue_type = NULL,
    issue_text = NULL,
    status = 'awaiting_issue_type',
    updated_at = NOW();
SELECT 'ok' AS result;

=WITH ord AS (
  SELECT store_id
  FROM public.order_summary
  WHERE order_id = '{{ String($('Normalize Feedback Input').first().json.order_id || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
  ORDER BY order_created_at DESC
  LIMIT 1
)
INSERT INTO public.order_feedback (order_id, chat_id, store_id, rating, issue_type, issue_text, status, created_at, updated_at)
VALUES (
  '{{ String($('Normalize Feedback Input').first().json.order_id || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ String($('Normalize Feedback Input').first().json.chat_id || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  (SELECT store_id FROM ord),
  'issue',
  '{{ String($('Normalize Feedback Input').first().json.issue_type || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  NULL,
  'awaiting_issue_details',
  NOW(),
  NOW()
)
ON CONFLICT (order_id, chat_id) DO UPDATE
SET store_id = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.store_id, public.order_feedback.store_id),
    rating = 'issue',
    issue_type = EXCLUDED.issue_type,
    issue_text = NULL,
    status = 'awaiting_issue_details',
    updated_at = NOW();
SELECT 'ok' AS result;

=WITH ord AS (
  SELECT store_id
  FROM public.order_summary
  WHERE order_id = '{{ String($('Normalize Feedback Input').first().json.order_id || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
  ORDER BY order_created_at DESC
  LIMIT 1
), existing AS (
  SELECT issue_type, store_id
  FROM public.order_feedback
  WHERE order_id = '{{ String($('Normalize Feedback Input').first().json.order_id || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
    AND chat_id = '{{ String($('Normalize Feedback Input').first().json.chat_id || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
)
INSERT INTO public.order_feedback (order_id, chat_id, store_id, rating, issue_type, issue_text, status, created_at, updated_at)
VALUES (
  '{{ String($('Normalize Feedback Input').first().json.order_id || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ String($('Normalize Feedback Input').first().json.chat_id || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  COALESCE((SELECT store_id FROM existing), (SELECT store_id FROM ord)),
  'issue',
  COALESCE((SELECT issue_type FROM existing), NULL),
  '{{ String($('Normalize Feedback Input').first().json.message || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  'submitted',
  NOW(),
  NOW()
)
ON CONFLICT (order_id, chat_id) DO UPDATE
SET store_id = COALESCE(public.order_feedback.store_id, EXCLUDED.store_id),
    rating = 'issue',
    issue_type = COALESCE(public.order_feedback.issue_type, EXCLUDED.issue_type),
    issue_text = EXCLUDED.issue_text,
    status = 'submitted',
    updated_at = NOW();
SELECT 'ok' AS result;

=SELECT
  os.order_id,
  os.chat_id,
  os.store_id,
  os.shipping_address,
  s.store_name,
  s.owner_whatsapp_number,
  ofb.issue_type
FROM public.order_summary os
LEFT JOIN public.stores s ON s.store_id = os.store_id
LEFT JOIN public.order_feedback ofb
  ON ofb.order_id = os.order_id
 AND ofb.chat_id = '{{ String($('Normalize Feedback Input').first().json.chat_id || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
WHERE os.order_id = '{{ String($('Normalize Feedback Input').first().json.order_id || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
ORDER BY os.order_created_at DESC
LIMIT 1;

tool_input.message: The milk I received was spoiled and expired. Very bad quality.
